title: Story: add tests and docs for adaptive default band

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added/updated tests for adaptive defaults and band switching: tests/test_clock_palette.py and tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py; targeted suites passing via uv run --extra dev pytest.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Feature commit pushed: 6141163. Added tests/test_clock_palette.py and updated tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py. Validation: uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_clock_palette.py -q (11 passed) and uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py -q (14 passed).
